summary: Comprehensive testing of YASH EstPro Batch 5 features completed. All 10 backend API tests passed (100%). All 8 frontend features tested and verified working: CRM ID field, Sub Technology dropdown, Sub Technologies master data page, Grid column layout ($/Month not overlapping Onsite), Projects Export to Excel, Dashboard Total Projects navigation.
passed_tests: GET /api/sub-technologies - Returns list of sub-technologies with parent technology linkage
POST /api/sub-technologies - Creates new sub-technology linked to parent technology
POST /api/projects - Accepts crm_id and sub_technology_ids fields
GET /api/projects?latest_only=false - Returns all project versions for export
POST /api/download-file - Download file proxy endpoint working
GET /api/dashboard/analytics - Returns total_projects count for dashboard card
Dashboard Total Projects card clickable → navigates to /projects page
Projects page 'Export to Excel' button triggers successful download
Sub Technologies master data page accessible via sidebar nav
Sub Technologies page shows CRUD functionality with parent tech badges
Project Estimator form shows CRM ID input field
Project Estimator form shows Sub Technology dropdown
Grid columns layout: $/Month (90px), Onsite toggle, Travel toggle - NO overlap
Grid sticky columns properly positioned: Skill→Level→Location→$/Month with shadow separator

crm_id_field.location: Project Estimator form - below Sales Manager

sub_technology_field.location: Project Estimator form - next to Technology field

grid_column_overlap_fix.issue: $/Month frozen column was overlapping Onsite column
grid_column_overlap_fix.fix: Reduced sticky column widths: Skill 148→140, Level 128→110, Location 140→120, $/Month 100→90
grid_column_overlap_fix.status: FIXED - Onsite and Travel columns fully visible

projects_export_excel.button: Export to Excel in Projects page header
projects_export_excel.status: WORKING - Toast shows 'Projects list exported successfully'

dashboard_total_projects_navigation.status: WORKING - Navigates to /projects page on click

smart_import_logistics_parsing.description: Reads logistics data from Excel formula column D in addition to description text column C
smart_import_logistics_parsing.formula_pattern: )*rate*days or )*rate*trips at end of formula string
smart_import_logistics_parsing.status: CODE VERIFIED - Implemented in ProjectEstimator.js lines 2262-2291

updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_batch5_features.py - New test file for batch 5 features
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_SubTech_Automation, TEST_CRM_ID_Project, TEST_SubTech_Project (all cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Batch 5 features fully tested. Key additions: 1) CRM ID field in Project Estimator form, 2) Sub Technology multi-select dropdown filtering by parent tech, 3) Sub Technologies master data page with CRUD, 4) Grid column overlap fixed by reducing sticky widths (total frozen now 532px), 5) Projects Export Excel downloads all versions via hidden iframe proxy, 6) Dashboard Total Projects card navigates to /projects, 7) Smart Import parses logistics from Excel formula column D. All backend models updated with crm_id and sub_technology_ids fields.
